posts.author: ben.pearcy (Ben Pearcy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We should be able to set board permissions using the workflow automator. This should support individual accounts as well as team-based permissions and guest accounts. Currently every board must have permissions set manually. Revoking permissions with the automator would aslo be greatly appreciated.

What are you trying to achieve

We should be able to set board permissions using the workflow automator. This should support individual accounts as well as team-based permissions and guest accounts. Currently every board must have permissions set manually. Revoking permissions with the automator would aslo be greatly appreciated.
